creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet

Log:
  Update devel/json-c to 0.13

  - Add TEST_TARGET
  - While I'm here, fix shebang for net/opensips
  - Bump PORTREVISION of dependent ports for shlib change
